crossEventQuestion: When should product value be monetized through price or packaging changes?
observation: The Copilot price and Teams unbundling events apply monetization or packaging changes only alongside an explicit customer-value rationale and concrete terms.
invariant: Change price or packaging only when customer value is identifiable and the commercial terms remain explicit.
boundaryConditions: Customer value and concrete commercial terms must both be identifiable.
unresolvedConflicts: The bounded public event set contains no reviewed Amy Hood event withholding monetization on this same value-and-terms axis.

decisionAxis.decisionQuestion: When should value support a price or packaging change?

conditions: Customer value is identifiable and the price or packaging terms are explicit.

conditionDelta: No reviewed opposite-condition monetization event is available in the bounded public evidence set.
actionDelta: Defer the price or packaging change when value or commercial terms are not supportable.
